S3-Fast.description: Pre-defined S3-Fast profile for quick off-site backups. Enter AWS access key ID, secret access key, bucket name, and adjust region if needed. Auto-adds STANDARD storage class and us-east-1 region.

B2-Archive.description: Pre-defined B2-Archive profile for cost-effective long-term storage. Enter B2 account ID (access_key_id), application key (secret), and bucket name.

GDrive-Share.description: Pre-defined Google Drive profile for shared folders. Create the remote, then run `rclone config` to authorize with OAuth and set root_folder_id.
